creator: andreas.sommer87@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #40)

Here are the things I tried to capture the latest issue I found. As Michael noted, this happened with the patched kernel (on 11.2), after days of stomping the system with I/O-heavy infinite background loops.

Interesting fact: `top` does not update anymore once per second, but can be updated with the Space key as usual. Also, my `screen` processes seem gone – the ones I used to run the background loops.

Please note that we now have two processes in zil_commit_impl, and possibly those two are interlocked?! I'm keeping the system in this state for now, just in case someone has an idea which debug information we should collect apart from the below.

-----------------
